# llms.txt
# https://palettly.xyz
> Free browser-based tools for designers and developers. Extract color palettes, generate CSS gradients, convert units, compress images and more. No sign-up needed.
# Last updated: 2026-04-08

## root

- [Palettly — Free Design & Developer Tools](https://palettly.xyz/)

## palette.html

- [Palettly — Free Color Palette Extractor from Images](https://palettly.xyz/palette.html)

## gradient.html

- [CSS Gradient Generator — Palettly](https://palettly.xyz/gradient.html)

## color-convert.html

- [Color Format Converter HEX RGB HSL — Palettly](https://palettly.xyz/color-convert.html)

## palette-generator.html

- [Color Palette Generator from Base Color — Palettly](https://palettly.xyz/palette-generator.html)

## units.html

- [CSS Unit Converter px rem em vh — Palettly](https://palettly.xyz/units.html)

## compress.html

- [Free Image Compressor — Palettly](https://palettly.xyz/compress.html)

## fonts.html

- [Google Fonts Picker & Preview — Palettly](https://palettly.xyz/fonts.html)

## mood.html

- [Mood Palette Generator — Palettly](https://palettly.xyz/mood.html)

## picker.html

- [Image Color Picker Eyedropper — Palettly](https://palettly.xyz/picker.html)

## convert.html

- [Image Format Converter SVG PNG JPG WEBP — Palettly](https://palettly.xyz/convert.html)

## spreadsheet.html

- [CSV to XLSX Converter — Spreadsheet Format Converter — Palettly](https://palettly.xyz/spreadsheet.html)

## pdf-to-docx.html

- [PDF to DOCX Converter — Free Online — Palettly](https://palettly.xyz/pdf-to-docx.html)

## canvas.html

- [Palettly Canvas — Free Online Drawing & Design Tool](https://palettly.xyz/canvas.html)
